.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(22, 22, 30) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(22, 22, 30) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(26, 27, 38) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(26, 27, 38) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(26, 27, 38) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgb(41, 46, 66) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(26, 27, 38) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgb(41, 46, 66) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(22, 22, 30) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(22, 22, 30) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(26, 27, 38) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(22, 22, 30) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(122, 162, 247) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(26, 27, 38) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(22, 22, 30) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(41, 46, 66) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(22, 22, 30) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(22, 22, 30) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
